; Fixture phase 1. Do not add a launch action before hardware confirmation.
; Chiappa/Ferrari Sidebar fixture SHA-256: dba999d3dbadf0a2c61506398a11f5ae485d637e15036d9dd508db2021df0fca
VERSION 3.28.0.162
AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[15885405667098360701]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[5882927607508357618]]#[[16045040163728568448]]
        INSERT {
            ~&5882927607508357618&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: lettersHomeLauncher
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "letters-home-launcher"
                ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Letters Home")
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/letters-home/icons/letter"
                ~&484431552542639914&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: ~&7081293686258&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&15061686673205541622&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {}
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
